name: mysql_mcp_server
label: MySQL MCP Server
description: 通过 MCP 协议操作 MySQL 数据库。支持只读查询、写入操作、事务支持
env_vars_json: {"MYSQL_HOST": {"required": true, "description": "MySQL \u4e3b\u673a\u5730\u5740"}, "MYSQL_PORT": {"required": false, "description": "MySQL \u7aef\u53e3 (\u9ed8\u8ba4 3306)"}, "MYSQL_USER": {"required": true, "description": "MySQL \u7528\u6237\u540d"}, "MYSQL_PASSWORD": {"required": true, "secret": true, "description": "MySQL \u5bc6\u7801"}, "MYSQL_DATABASE": {"required": false, "description": "\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u540d"}}
